---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for laravel-page-builder
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem or limitation you are running into that this feature would address. For example: "I am trying to do X but the package currently does not support Y."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Include proposed API design, method signatures, or component interfaces where relevant.

```php
// Example of what the proposed API might look like
PageBuilder::register('my_section', requiredFields: ['title']);
```

```tsx
// Example of a proposed React API, if applicable
<SectionRenderer section={section} customRenderers={{ my_section: MySection }} />
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches or workarounds you have already tried.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references that would help explain the request.
